title: Nested blocks of code should not be left empty
description:
Nested blocks of code should not be left emptyAnalyze your codeintentionality-clearmaintainabilityCode SmellQuick FixIDE quick fixes available with SonarQube for IDEsuspiciousAn empty code block is confusing. It will require some effort from maintainers to determine if it is intentional or indicates the implementation is
incomplete.for (let i = 0; i < length; i++) {}  // Non
recommendation: Review and fix according to the rule guidelines.

checks.message: Empty nested blocks should be removed or contain meaningful code
